requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety & Thermal Runaway Propagation — BESS (Romania / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统消防安全与热失控扩散（罗马尼亚／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統消防安全與熱失控擴散（羅馬尼亞／歐盟）

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 sets safety requirements for grid-connected energy storage systems, including evaluation of thermal runaway propagation at cell, module and system level. EN IEC 62933-5-2 is the harmonised European adoption (harmonised status under OJ review as of 2026-06-11 due to Malamud ruling). Installations in Romania must demonstrate that thermal runaway in one cell does not propagate uncontrolled to adjacent cells/modules. Romanian fire-safety regulations (Normativ P 118 series) and installers additionally require UL 9540A fire-test data to quantify heat release and propagation risk for fire-compartment design. ASRO adopts EN standards as SR EN equivalents.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020为并网储能系统规定了安全要求，包括在电芯、模组和系统层级对热失控扩散进行评估。EN IEC 62933-5-2为该标准的欧洲协调版本（截至2026-06-11，协调标准官方公报登录状态在审）。在罗马尼亚的安装项目须证明单一电芯热失控不会不受控地蔓延至相邻电芯或模组。罗马尼亚消防安全法规（Normativ P 118系列）及安装商亦额外要求提供UL 9540A火灾试验数据，用于量化释热量与扩散风险以进行防火分区设计。ASRO将EN标准采标为SR EN等效标准。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020為並網儲能系統規定安全要求，包括在電芯、模組及系統層級對熱失控擴散進行評估。EN IEC 62933-5-2為該標準的歐洲協調版本（截至2026-06-11，協調標準官方公報登錄狀態在審）。在羅馬尼亞的安裝項目須證明單一電芯熱失控不會不受控地蔓延至相鄰電芯或模組。羅馬尼亞消防安全法規（Normativ P 118系列）及安裝商亦額外要求提供UL 9540A火災試驗數據，用以量化釋熱量與擴散風險以進行防火分區設計。ASRO將EN標準採標為SR EN等效標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 — Electrical energy storage (EES) systems – Part 5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems
EN IEC 62933-5-2 (harmonised EU adoption — harmonised status under review as of 2026-06-11 due to Malamud ruling)
ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A:2025 (5th Edition, March 2025) — Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems
Normativ P 118/99 and P 118-2:2013 — Romanian fire safety design norms for buildings (administered by IGSU)

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (revised, released 6 August 2023 by SAC/SAMR, in force from 1 March 2024, superseding GB/T 36276-2018) covers lithium-ion battery packs and systems for stationary energy storage, including thermal-runaway tests at cell and module level. The 2023 revision tightened test conditions (e.g. external short-circuit resistance reduced from 5 mΩ to 1 mΩ) and expanded abuse-test coverage. However, the propagation-prevention test methodology and pass/fail thresholds differ from IEC 62933-5-2. GB/T 36276 does not adopt UL 9540A protocols, and system-level fire-compartment propagation data generated under Chinese test conditions is generally not in the format required by EU installers or Romanian authorities.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（修订版，国家标准化管理委员会/国家市场监督管理总局于2023年8月6日发布，2024年3月1日起实施，取代GB/T 36276-2018）涵盖固定式储能用锂离子电池包及系统，包含电芯和模组层级的热失控试验。2023年修订版收紧了试验条件并扩展了滥用测试范围。然而，其扩散防止试验方法与合格判定准则与IEC 62933-5-2存在差异。GB/T 36276未采用UL 9540A测试规程，依中国试验条件生成的系统级防火分区扩散数据，通常无法满足欧盟安装商或罗马尼亚当局所要求的格式。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（修訂版，國家標準化管理委員會/國家市場監督管理總局於2023年8月6日發布，2024年3月1日起實施，取代GB/T 36276-2018）涵蓋固定式儲能用鋰離子電池包及系統，包含電芯和模組層級的熱失控試驗。2023年修訂版收緊了試驗條件並擴展了濫用測試範圍。然而，其擴散防止試驗方法與合格判定準則與IEC 62933-5-2存在差異。GB/T 36276未採用UL 9540A測試規程，依中國試驗條件生成的系統級防火分區擴散數據，通常無法滿足歐盟安裝商或羅馬尼亞當局所要求的格式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-ion battery packs and systems for electric energy storage (released 6 August 2023, in force 1 March 2024, supersedes GB/T 36276-2018)
GB/T 51048-2025 — Standard for Design of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Station (issued 31 December 2025, effective 1 April 2026)

gap.en: Key gap: Chinese test reports under GB/T 36276 typically do not include the system-level thermal-runaway propagation test data required by IEC 62933-5-2 Annex C, nor UL 9540A heat-release-rate (HRR) and fire-spread data needed for Romanian building and fire-compartment approvals. ANRE project permits and Romanian fire-safety authority (IGSU) approvals increasingly require UL 9540A-format data. Chinese manufacturers rarely commission UL 9540A tests. This documentation gap is a frequent barrier at the EU project-finance and Romanian permitting stage.
gap.zh: 主要差距：依GB/T 36276出具的中国测试报告，通常不包含IEC 62933-5-2附录C所要求的系统级热失控扩散试验数据，亦不含罗马尼亚建筑及防火分区审批所需的UL 9540A热释放速率（HRR）与火势蔓延数据。ANRE项目许可及罗马尼亚消防安全机构（IGSU）审批日益要求提供UL 9540A格式数据。中国制造商鲜少委托进行UL 9540A测试，此文件缺口是欧盟项目融资和罗马尼亚许可阶段的常见障碍。
gap.zht: 主要差距：依GB/T 36276出具的中國測試報告，通常不包含IEC 62933-5-2附錄C所要求的系統級熱失控擴散試驗數據，亦不含羅馬尼亞建築及防火分區審批所需的UL 9540A熱釋放速率（HRR）與火勢蔓延數據。ANRE項目許可及羅馬尼亞消防安全機構（IGSU）審批日益要求提供UL 9540A格式數據。中國製造商鮮少委託進行UL 9540A測試，此文件缺口是歐盟項目融資和羅馬尼亞許可階段的常見障礙。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62933-5-2 / EN IEC 62933-5-2 is referenced in Romanian and EU grid-connection and building regulations. Its harmonised status under LVD is not yet confirmed by OJ citation as of mid-2026 due to the Malamud ruling. UL 9540A (5th Edition, March 2025) is not mandated by EU law but is functionally required by many Romanian AHJs and insurers.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36276-2023 is a recommended (推荐性) national standard in China. GB/T 51048-2025 is also classified as recommended (推荐性), superseding the mandatory (强制性) GB 51048-2014. Verify enforcement scope against current NEA project-approval requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INFORMATIONAL ONLY — Chinese BESS products certified to GB/T 36276 alone are likely to face documentation gaps when seeking Romanian/EU project permits or financing, specifically the absence of IEC 62933-5-2 system-level thermal-runaway propagation test data and UL 9540A fire-spread data. Manufacturers targeting Romania should commission supplementary testing to these standards. This is not legal advice; verify current requirements with a qualified EU notified body and Romanian fire-safety authority.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考——仅依据GB/T 36276认证的中国储能产品，在申请罗马尼亚及欧盟项目许可或融资时，很可能面临文件缺口，具体表现为缺乏IEC 62933-5-2系统级热失控扩散试验数据及UL 9540A火势蔓延数据。面向罗马尼亚市场的制造商应委托开展上述标准的补充测试。本内容不构成法律意见，请向具备资质的欧盟公告机构及罗马尼亚消防安全当局核实当前要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考——僅依據GB/T 36276認證的中國儲能產品，在申請羅馬尼亞及歐盟項目許可或融資時，很可能面臨文件缺口，具體表現為缺乏IEC 62933-5-2系統級熱失控擴散試驗數據及UL 9540A火勢蔓延數據。面向羅馬尼亞市場的製造商應委託開展上述標準的補充測試。本內容不構成法律意見，請向具備資質的歐盟公告機構及羅馬尼亞消防安全當局核實當前要求。
